violations.text: An employee was observed washing disposable gloves in hand sink. Employee changed gloves and washed hands. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the bottom of the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Product was relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Chemical was replaced and tested @ 50 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

ROP seafood was observed thawing with package in tact. Food was observed at 41 degrees in package. Food was disposed of. Proper thawing reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in racks have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
The soda dispenser was observed draining into the hand sink. The drainage must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored behind ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be stored in a manner from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage to prevent contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
Utensils were stored between prep unit. Utensils were relocated to dish washer. Utensils to not be stored between the prep units. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
The grout and the tiles in the dishwashing area were observed in poor repair. Physical facility to get repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC voluntarily disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the dough mixer have an accumulation food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the upstairs storage area and outside back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
